2026-04-15T03:05:49.7127524Z ---
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7128052Z description: |
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7128743Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7170010Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7171039Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7171589Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7171752Z on:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7172119Z   push:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7172492Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7172928Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7173174Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7173357Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7173626Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7173794Z network: defaults
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7174027Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7174207Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7174621Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7175113Z   create-issue:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7175505Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7176087Z   noop:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7176471Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7176913Z   jobs:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7177278Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7177966Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7178739Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7179208Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7179679Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7180220Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7180629Z         actions: write
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7181044Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7181450Z       steps:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7182212Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7183222Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7183933Z           env:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7184606Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7185400Z           with:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7186004Z             script: |
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7186568Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7187259Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7188016Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7188689Z                 return;
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7189101Z               }
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7189325Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7189945Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7190710Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7191236Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7191714Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7192603Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7193476Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7194434Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7195083Z               }
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7195312Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7195939Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7196570Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7197052Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7197616Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7198120Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7198657Z               });

2026-04-15T03:05:49.7313367Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7313794Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7314038Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7314228Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7314483Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7314654Z network: defaults
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7315208Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7315378Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7316208Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7316710Z   create-issue:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7317107Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7317465Z   noop:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7317870Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7318309Z   jobs:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7318677Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7319341Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7320116Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7320588Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7321061Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7321580Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7321990Z         actions: write
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7322402Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7322815Z       steps:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7323231Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7323772Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7324280Z           env:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7324901Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7326058Z           with:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7326459Z             script: |
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7326985Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7327658Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7328352Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7329455Z                 return;
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7329915Z               }
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7330150Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7330396Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7332177Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7332764Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7333266Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7334195Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7335086Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7336456Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7337088Z               }
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7337321Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7338189Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7338843Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7339320Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7339881Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7340399Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7340960Z               });
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7341471Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7341925Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7342088Z tools:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7342456Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7342828Z   github:
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7343217Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7343519Z 
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7343711Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7344321Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7345054Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-15T03:05:49.7397552Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
